files.patch: @@ -5891,2 +5891,2 @@ - If the frame's method is a value object constructor and - the requested local is the "this" object, the + When preview features are enabled, the frame's method is a value object + constructor and the requested local is the "this" object, the @@ -5947,2 +5947,2 @@ - If the frame's method is a value object constructor, the - value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. + When preview features are enabled and the frame's method is a value object + constructor, the value_ptr is set to a snapshot of the "this" object. @@ -14140,0 +14140,1 @@ + When preview features are enabled, this event does not supports value object allocations.
